<!-- If you have ideas on implementation, share them here -->


## Additional Context
<!-- Screenshots, examples, benchmarks, links to similar implementations -->


## Priority Assessment
<!-- Help us prioritize this improvement -->
- **Impact:** High / Medium / Low
- **Effort:** High / Medium / Low
- **Dependencies:** None / List them
- **Urgency:** Can wait / Should do soon / Needed for milestone
